title: 2025.4.08Using an AWS microservice architecture for subscription managementSummary:Explore the complexities of enterprise subscription management and discover how an AWS microservice architecture can streamline subscription lifecycles. This guide uses AWS services to create a scalable, reliable, and auditable subscription management system, addressing challenges like mid-cycle plan changes and usage-based billing adjustments.Author:James BeswickTopic:AWSRead
author: James Beswick
